engine: recall_b (zero-LLM sub-query decomposition + RRF + cosine rerank)
changes: truncation 6000->2000 chars, min_token_len 4->3, retry with backoff, empty text handling
notes: Zero embed failures (vs 27 in original baseline). Truncation fix + token threshold. R@1 unchanged at 56%, confirming the bottleneck is embedding quality / vocabulary mismatch, not truncation.
